title: StructurePack
body:
![Structure Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6900b60bfb253647b3831b319816459e18da628.png)
### Descriotion
This datapack adds more than 10 new vanilla structures for the world of Minecraft

Here are the commands to find them:

`/locate structure mjstructure:abandoned_fortress`

`/locate structure mjstructure:camping`

`/locate structure mjstructure:church_ruins`

`/locate structure mjstructure:desert_altar`

`/locate structure mjstructure:desert_ruins`

`/locate structure mjstructure:desert_tree`

`/locate structure mjstructure:mangrove_dungeon`

`/locate structure mjstructure:mountain_beacon`

`/locate structure mjstructure:pillager_jungle_outpost`

`/locate structure mjstructure:pillager_stonehand`

`/locate structure mjstructure:pit_trap`

`/locate structure mjstructure:ruins_farm_house`

`/locate structure mjstructure:tower_ruins`

You can see all the structures in the [**Gallery**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structurepack/gallery)

You can find the source code on my [GitHub](https://github.com/MusiJVR/StructurePack) or you can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/xY8WJt7VGr)
